title: Precedent
content:
The poor man went to the rich man's doors,
    "I come as Lazarus came," he said.
    The rich man turned with humble head,--
    "I will send my dogs to lick your sores!"
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Paul Laurence Dunbar delivers a powerful performance in "Precedent"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
